videos.title: NÃO SEJA ENTERRADO PELO CHOCOLATE!
videos.description:
A shopper.com.br é a vendedora oficial de Feastables no Brasil. Para comprar acesse www.shopper.com.br ou baixe o App. 
https://apps.apple.com/br/app/shopper...
https://play.google.com/store/apps/de...

Meu espetáculo: https://www.enaldinho.com.br

O conteúdo deste e de todos os vídeos do canal tem como principal intuito o entretenimento. Não repita ou reproduza este conteúdo, seja em ambientes públicos ou privados. O conteúdo visa exclusivamente gerar entretenimento.

CANAL DA ELO TEAM: https://www.youtube.com/results?searc...

Seja membro deste canal e ganhe benefícios:
   / @enaldinho  

COMPRE SEU LIVRÃO DO ZAP: http://bit.ly/livrosdoenaldinho

MINHA LOJA:  http://lolja.com.br/enaldinho

INSTA: @Enaldinho ou www.instagram.com/enaldinho/

★ Siga nas redes sociais:

videos.transcript: Pesquisar transcrição Whoever ends up under the chocolate first loses. The production team prepared these two giant tanks and split us into two pairs. One member will stay inside the tank, while the other competes in a challenge against the other pair. Whoever loses has a level of their tank filled with chocolate. And whoever gets completely submerged loses the challenge. If you did n't know, this video is a partnership with Shopper, the online supermarket. They brought Feastables chocolates to Brazil, MrBeast 's own chocolate, the biggest YouTuber. In fact, this tank is entirely inspired by the chocolate packaging. And that 's why we 're going to fill these tanks with a liquid that looks like chocolate. So let 's go to the first challenge to see which tank will fill up first. Bruno, you can relax because I wo n't let a single level of chocolate rise. Let 's go, Jess, do you trust me? Yes, Alright then, We 're in this together in this round, I want to see who can recreate the biggest Feastables chocolate bar. This is a chocolate bar, full of details. And I want to see who can make the most realistic one of all. This mission is tough, but having made giant foods before, I 'll recreate a bar of ... giant Mr Beast. As you can see, the packaging is predominantly blue and striking, just like the chocolate. But on the inside, it has very specific designs with little squares in different shapes. So, I decided to look for a 3D model of this bar on the internet and look, I actually found it. And, as you may already know, I have 2 different 3D printers at my house. So, I 'm just going to set this model to print, but in a giant version. I have to admit to you guys that this mission is really hard, but ah, it 's not impossible. And the first task is to melt all of this here so we have plenty of chocolate. Now that I 've put all the chocolate in here, let 's put it in the microwave for a while until everything melts. It took a bit of work to glue all the pieces together, but just take a look at the result. But unfortunately, this bar is made of plastic and is n't edible. So, my idea is to use it to simply create a rubber mold, and then actually make it out of chocolate. I 'm already, in fact, preparing the mixture that we 're going to use to make the mold. Now we just need to pour this mixture in and wait for it to dry completely on top. The first batch of Fishballs is already melted, man. And look, let 's go ahead and pour it into our mold now. That 's a lot of chocolate, but our mold is so big that it looks like it 's not enough, man. I think I 'm going to have to melt about two more boxes of those fishballs. To completely fill our mold. After this process, I 'm going to put it in the fridge and let it harden, man. And I think I 'm going to have to repeat this twice. So that the chocolate ... Besides being big, also has a nice thickness. It took quite a while, but now let 's see if our mold really worked. Since this material is kind of fragile, you have to be really careful so the rubber does n't tear and ... We simply have a giant MR Beast chocolate mold. Now, with our mold ready, we just need a lot of chocolate. And for that, I bought all these Feastables bars. It 's taking quite a while for us to get all our chocolate, but I think it 's finally reached the consistency we need. Now we just have to pour the chocolate into our mold and wait for it all to harden. I put it in the freezer. It 's already completely firm, man. Now I need to unmold this here. And just take a look, man. It 's a giant Fishbowl, guys, man. Look at the difference between the traditional bar and the size of this bar I made. Now let 's unmold this carefully. Because I 'm going to use the mold to repeat this process again. I turned the mold over. Now it 's the moment of truth, guys. three, two, one and ... Honestly, it worked really well, man, look at this, it 's incredibly smooth, and it 's just wonderful. videos.title: PASSANDO A NOITE NO SHOPPING ÀS 3H DA MANHÃ! *Deu ruim?!
videos.description:
